name: 1997-bay-networks--concentrating-on-remo-06bdd8
title: Bay Networks: Concentrating on Remote Access
description: This Aberdeen Announcement Profile examines Bay Networks' two new remote access concentrator products: the 5399 (high-density, modular, for service providers and large enterprises) and the Model 8000 (stand-alone, for smaller ISPs and enterprises). Both feature BayDSP modem technology from Bay's acquisition of Penril Datability Networks. Aberdeen evaluates the emerging 56K modem market and how Bay's solutions address high-density remote access requirements.
